name: Helios
description: With 'Investigator' as its unique Precept and 'Deconstructor' as its weapon, the versatile Helios Sentinel acts as both a lethal guardian and an automatic codex scanner. Scans require an equipped Codex Scanner and an available charge.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: With 'Investigator' as its unique Precept and 'Deconstructor' as its weapon, the versatile Helios Sentinel acts as both a lethal guardian and an automatic codex scanner. Scans require an equipped Codex Scanner and an available charge.

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Fieldron
components.description:
ClanTech weaponized containment field to contain superheated substances.

Location: Clan Research (Energy Lab in the Dojo) and Corpus Invasion Rewards

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Oxium
components.description:
Oxium is a rare lighter than air alloy of Orokin origin, used in certain Corpus Robotics.

Location: Venus, Jupiter, Mars, Neptune, Pluto, Eris, Europa, and Lua.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.1.4
patchlogs.changes:
Removed Helios Prime's Mastery Rank 8 requirement. 
A follow up to Hotfix 32.0.9, Helios Prime was the only Sentinel with a Mastery Rank requirement, so we removed it to make it consistent with the rest.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of War: Banshee & Mirage Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.1.3
patchlogs.changes:
Helios Prime
Helios Prime
Banshee Prime, Mirage Prime, Euphona Prime, Kogake Prime, Akbolto Prime, Helios Prime, and Deconstructor Prime Relics have been added to the drop tables! These Relics have replaced the Rhino Prime & Nyx Prime, Relics in the Void drop tables, Bounties, and Relic Packs.

patchlogs.name: The New War: Hotfix 31.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some Dojo Decorations having their description tag linger in the HUD. Also fixes Helios thinking the Decorations are a valid scan target.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.5: Sisters of Parvos
patchlogs.changes: The Sisters of Parvos update will bring three new Modular Hound Companions, each with a unique Melee weapon. While reviewing these Companion Weapons, we noticed the Helios-old problem that there’s a lot of Melee Mods that you can equip, but don’t really function on companion Melee. There’s also some ‘invisible gear hopping’ where if you put Mods on your Deconstructor (or Prime), they carry over to your Melee which is a many-year-old oversight we’ve lived with, but are approaching changes more thoroughly with this Update and as a result we’re patching up this behaviour.

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Update 30.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Helios UI scan sounds playing loudly during Orbiter fly in cinematics.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Hotfix 30.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash that could occur if Helios attempted to scan while playing as Sevagoth.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Prime Vault 29.5.9
patchlogs.changes: Banshee Prime, Mirage Prime, Euphona Prime, Kogake Prime, Akbolto Prime, Helios Prime, and Deconstructor Prime Relics have been added to the drop tables!

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Helios attempting, but not completing, scans while you are in Necramech form.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Helios struggling to Scan anything while you’re piloting a Necramech.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Lanka, Opticor, Helios, Convectrix & Arca Plasmor Research missing from the Energy Lab.

patchlogs.name: Prime Vault: Hotfix 25.7.4 + 25.7.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect Energy colors on the Simaris Helios Skin.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.8
patchlogs.changes: Reverted the recent Helios scanning changes to restore its ability to scan collectibles (Thousand-Year Fish, Fortuna Lore Fragments, etc). After much player and internal feedback, we’re keeping this a ‘bug turned feature’.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.7 + 24.2.7.1
patchlogs.changes: Helios no longer scans Solaris Lore Fragments.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixes towards Helios/Helios Prime only scanning new Orb Vallis enemies that were within 60 meters of the Fortuna elevator for Hosts.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Hotfix 23.10.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixes towards Scanners not functioning for Clients. This also fixes cases where Helios would not scan new entries.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Hotfix 23.8.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Helios’ Simaris Skin indicating it is for an item which you do not own if you only own Helios Prime.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.17.4
patchlogs.changes: Optimized Helios' Investigator Precept: it should now find targets more than 10x faster and no longer causes periodic spikes in frame-time as high as 7ms.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.15.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Helios' Detect Vulnerability precept not applying the Damage multiplier on enemies seated in mounted guns or Jesters riding Kuva Guardians.
Fixed cases where Helios began vibrating when equipped with the Investigator precept.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Helios and Helios Prime take a long time to find a new target after being interrupted.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.4.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash from Helios’ Detect Vulnerability Precept.

patchlogs.name: The Pacifism Defect: Update 19.12.0
patchlogs.changes: Deconstructor Prime can now be used on non-Prime Helios.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed file paths appearing for Helios Prime when crafting it in the Foundry.
Fixed being able to equip Deconstructor on a Sentinel that is not Helios.

patchlogs.name: Banshee Prime: Hotfix 19.11.5 + 19.11.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a bug where non-Helios Sentinels could equip the Deconstructor when randomizing their loadout.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.4.2 + 19.4.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing note on the Open Slot requirement for Helios in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Hotfix 19.0.2
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage of Helios' Deconstructor in The War Within quest.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.9.0
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed Helios’ Deconstructor not continuously firing as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/626340-broken-deconstructor/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Helios being able to scan Oddities.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Helios being able to scan Oddities.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.5.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Helios not attacking enemies when equipped with the Deconstructor.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.3.1 + 16.3.1.1 + Tactical Alert
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Helios’ Simaris skin using the wrong energy color.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.1.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where reviving would cause Helios to scan targets with complete Codex entries as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/423544-bug-helios-scans-completed-scan-targets-after-reviving-yourself/?hl=helios

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Sanctuary
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue where if Helios restarts his scan, players would lose all Codex information gained in the Mission so far.
Fixed the energy color of Helios not applying to his center ‘eye’ until you back out of Appearance in the Arsenal.
Fixed issue with Helios caused by viewing another player’s profile then entering a Mission, causing Helios to count scans from other player’s completed Codex.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue with Helios not scanning properly.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a number of problems with the Codex Scanner (including Helios’s user of the Scanner):Fixed handling of certain compound objects like Death Orbs (you could not scan them and neither could Helios).
Fixed Helios refusing to scan decorations while there were scannable objects out of sight.
Changed Helios to reduce time between scans (often over 3 seconds was wasted).
Simplified Helios' scan logic to avoid a bunch of heavy-lifting that is already done by native code.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.5: Operation Cryotic Front!
patchlogs.fixes: • Fixed Helios endlessly rescanning things not in the Codex. Specific examples: void turrets, arc traps, Grineer laser sensors above doors, smashable grates & fans.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.6.0 + 13.6.0.1: Pyrana
patchlogs.fixes: Helios Changes:

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.4.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed an issue with Helios' incorrectly scanning objects outside of the players aim as well as objects whose Codex entry is already complete. Helio sfix, Codex entries for crates will follow.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.3.0: Pack Hunters
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Helios' Investigator Precept not properly displaying/calculating its max rank and perpetually behaving like a rank 0 mod. It will also receive a target lock so it doesn’t Get distracted during scans so easily.

patchlogs.name: Update 12.6.0: Dex Furis (Limited Time Gift!)
patchlogs.changes: The targeting range for the attack precepts at max-rank are as follows:Carrier: 10mDethCube: 30mDjinn: 60mWyrm: 30mShade: 30m(Unranked attack precepts will have half the range listed above).Helios is special at does not increase with rank (it is always 10m) however ranking up the Targeting Receptor precept increase the number of active glaives it can manage.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed potential issues with Helios not having high resolution textures.
